result.description: Reserve on CL-108300 raised to $92,800 based on origin report identifying FPE Stab-Lok panel model. Requires manager sign-off per policy Section 4.2. Manufacturer recall confirmed. Subrogation opened SUB-0155-2026.

result.close_notes: Confirmed exception pattern from playbook. Evidence chain preserved for wiring. Day 30 review scheduled.

result.description: Courtesy notice to SIU on file exposure. No investigation opened. Standard 4A/prior/panel triple.

January fire with displaced-family ALE at week 4. Reserve pattern for cold-weather panel-cause claims documented in Confluence (page 298471234 update). Requesting extension approval past Day 15 review.
result.close_notes: Extension approved through Day 30. Cold-weather premium reserve pattern confirmed.

result.description: Origin report cleared to standard panel-cause with no manufacturer defect. Same-day ROR release per playbook SOP #3. Insured contacted by phone before written release.
